'''vakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:urceolately|urceolately]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:urceolately|urceolately]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vakate|vakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vakatesher|vakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vakatesherĂ«m|vakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vakatero|vakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vakateshĂ«|vakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vakateshĂ«m|vakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivakatero|gokivakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivakateshĂ«|gokivakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivakateshĂ«m|gokivakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govakankerom|govakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govakankeshĂ«|govakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govakankeshĂ«m|govakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govakankeya|govakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vakaterom|vakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vakatemu|vakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vakateya|vakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivakaterom|gokivakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivakatemu|gokivakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivakateya|gokivakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vakakate|vakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vakakatesher|vakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vakakatesherĂ«m|vakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vakakatero|vakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vakakateshĂ«|vakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vakakateshĂ«m|vakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivakakatero|gokivakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivakakateshĂ«|gokivakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivakakateshĂ«m|gokivakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govakakankerom|govakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govakakankeshĂ«|govakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govakakankeshĂ«m|govakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govakakankeya|govakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vakakaterom|vakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vakakatemu|vakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vakakateya|vakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivakakaterom|gokivakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivakakatemu|gokivakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivakakateya|gokivakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠkĂŠte|vĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠkĂŠtesher|vĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠkĂŠtero|vĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠkĂŠtero|gokivĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠkĂŠnkerom|govĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠkĂŠnkeya|govĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠkĂŠtemu|vĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠkĂŠteya|vĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠkĂŠterom|gokivĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠkĂŠteya|gokivĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafkafte|vafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafkaftesher|vafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafkaftesherĂ«m|vafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafkaftero|vafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafkafteshĂ«|vafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafkafteshĂ«m|vafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafkaftero|gokivafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafkafteshĂ«|gokivafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafkafteshĂ«m|gokivafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafkafnkerom|govafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafkafnkeshĂ«|govafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafkafnkeshĂ«m|govafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafkafnkeya|govafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafkafterom|vafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafkaftemu|vafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafkafteya|vafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafkafterom|gokivafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafkaftemu|gokivafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafkafteya|gokivafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
